# Example SAM parameter overrides for dev
# Copy these values into `sam deploy --guided` prompts or `samconfig.toml`.
# Note: The template prefixes most resources with `${ProjectName}-${EnvironmentName}-`,
# so these are suffix/base names (not fully prefixed names).

ProjectName=rag-study-assistant
EnvironmentName=dev
AwsRegion=ap-southeast-1
PythonRuntime=python3.12

S3GeneralPurposeBucketName=document-upload-sam
RawPrefix=raws
ChunksPrefix=chunks
S3VectorBucketName=vector-store-sam
S3VectorIndexName=chunk-embeddings-vector-index-sam

DynamoManifestTableName=document-vector-manifest-sam
DynamoCorpusChangeTableName=corpus-change-table-sam
DynamoCollectionTermStatsTableName=collection-term-stats-sam
DynamoDocTermStatsTableName=doc-term-stats-sam

IngestionQueueName=ingest-queue-sam
IngestionDlqName=ingest-dlq-sam
DeletionQueueName=delete-queue-sam
DeletionDlqName=delete-dlq-sam
QueueVisibilityTimeoutSeconds=360

IngestionFunctionName=ingestion-worker-sam
DeletionFunctionName=deletion-worker-sam

ChunkingModelId=amazon.titan-embed-text-v2:0
EmbeddingModelId=amazon.titan-embed-text-v2:0

LambdaMemorySize=1024
LambdaTimeoutSeconds=180
